texto: But at some point, we've got to have disciplined play and have got to coach better. I'm not putting it on the players. We've got to coach them to tackle and block better. It's as simple as that. If we can do those things, we'll have a chance.
explicacao: Citação de Steve Spurrier sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “But at some point, we've got to have disciplined play and have got to coach better. I'm not putti…” articula reflexao, simple, better em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como better e play.

frase_original: But at some point, we've got to have disciplined play and have got to coach better. I'm not putting it on the players. We've got to coach them to tackle and block better. It's as simple as that. If we can do those things, we'll have a chance.
